headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on Ecolab, Maintains $337 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Ashish Sabadra   reiterates Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) with a Outperform and maintains $337 price target.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Ecolab, Lowers Price Target to $260
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $285 to $260.
